name: Fricassee of Spring Vegetables with Black
recipeIngredient: Golden Beets: 1/4 cup, cooked until tender
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Prepare all vegetables separately by peeling and sautéing them in a skillet on the stovetop until light golden brown.
3. Season the vegetables with vinegar, parsley, truffle juice, and chopped black truffles.
4. Add a small amount of extra virgin olive oil to the vegetables.
5. Place the seasoned vegetables in a large bowl and serve hot. The dish can also be served chilled as a salad.
6. Yield: 4 servings
